#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Rust code generator for streaming data processor modules."""

from typing import Dict, List

from base_generator import CodeGenerator, val_str


class RustCodeGenerator(CodeGenerator):
    """Generates Rust crate code from transformation config."""

    def generate(self) -> Dict[str, str]:
        return {
            'Cargo.toml': self._generate_cargo_toml(),
            'src/lib.rs': self._generate_lib_rs(),
        }

    def _generate_cargo_toml(self) -> str:
        lines = [
            '[package]',
            f'name = "{self.module_name}"',
            'version = "0.1.0"',
            'edition = "2021"',
            '',
            '[lib]',
            'name = "' + self.module_name + '"',
            'path = "src/lib.rs"',
            '',
            '[dependencies]',
            'serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }',
            'serde_json = "1.0"',
            '',
        ]
        return '\n'.join(lines)

    def _generate_lib_rs(self) -> str:
        has_stateful = self.has_stateful
        has_neighbor_filters = self.has_neighbor_filters

        lines = [
            '//! Dynamic Preprocessor - Streaming data processor with caching support.',
            '',
            'use std::collections::BTreeMap;',
            'use std::fs::{self, File};',
            'use std::io::{BufRead, BufReader, Read, Write};',
            'use std::path::PathBuf;',
            'use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};',
            '',
            'pub mod api {',
            '    use std::collections::BTreeMap;',
            '    use std::io;',
            '    use std::path::Path;',
            '',
            '    /// Represents a cell value in a row.',
            '    #[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Serialize, Deserialize)]',
            '    #[serde(untagged)]',
            '    pub enum Value {',
            '        Null,',
            '        Bool(bool),',
            '        Int(i64),',
            '        Float(f64),',
            '        Str(String),',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    impl Value {',
            '        pub fn is_null(&self) -> bool {',
            '            matches!(self, Value::Null)',
            '        }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    impl Default for Value {',
            '        fn default() -> Self {',
            '            Value::Null',
            '        }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    impl From<bool> for Value {',
            '        fn from(v: bool) -> Self { Value::Bool(v) }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    impl From<i64> for Value {',
            '        fn from(v: i64) -> Self { Value::Int(v) }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    impl From<i32> for Value {',
            '        fn from(v: i32) -> Self { Value::Int(v as i64) }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    impl From<f64> for Value {',
            '        fn from(v: f64) -> Self { Value::Float(v) }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    impl From<String> for Value {',
            '        fn from(v: String) -> Self { Value::Str(v) }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    impl From<&str> for Value {',
            '        fn from(v: &str) -> Self { Value::Str(v.to_string()) }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    pub type Row = BTreeMap<String, Value>;',
            '',
        ]

        lines.extend([
            '    /// Streaming preprocessor with caching and resuming support.',
            '    pub struct DynamicPreprocessor {',
            '        buffer: usize,',
            '        cache_dir: Option<String>,',
            '        current_path: Option<String>,',
            '        raw_rows: Vec<BTreeMap<String, String>>,',
            '        current_idx: usize,',
            '        processed_rows: usize,',
            '        cached_rows: Vec<Row>,',
            '        buffer_count: usize,',
        ])

        if has_stateful:
            lines.extend(self._generate_rust_state_fields())

        if has_neighbor_filters:
            lines.extend([
                '        pending_row: Option<BTreeMap<String, String>>,',
                '        pending_idx: Option<usize>,',
                '        prev_row: Option<BTreeMap<String, String>>,',
            ])

        lines.extend([
            '    }',
            '',
        ])

        lines.extend(self._generate_rust_impl())

        lines.extend([
            '',
            '    impl Iterator for DynamicPreprocessor {',
            '        type Item = Row;',
            '',
            '        fn next(&mut self) -> Option<Self::Item> {',
            '            self.next_row()',
            '        }',
            '    }',
            '',
            '    // MD5 hash function for cache keys',
            '    fn md5_hash(data: &[u8]) -> u128 {',
            '        let mut hash: u128 = 5381;',
            '        for &b in data {',
            '            hash = ((hash << 5).wrapping_add(hash)) ^ b as u128;',
            '        }',
            '        for &b in data {',
            '            hash = ((hash << 5).wrapping_add(hash)) ^ b as u128;',
            '        }',
            '        hash',
            '    }',
            '',
            '}  // mod api',
            '',
        ])

        return '\n'.join(lines)

    def _generate_rust_state_fields(self) -> List[str]:
        lines = []
        for i, st in enumerate(self.get_stateful_transforms()):
            st_type = st.get('type')
            if st_type == 'prefix_sum':
                lines.append(f'        prefix_sum_{i}: f64,')
            elif st_type == 'prefix_count':
                lines.append(f'        prefix_count_{i}: i64,')
            elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
                lines.append(f'        window_{i}: Vec<f64>,')
                window_size = st.get('window_size', 3)
                lines.append(f'        window_size_{i}: usize,')
            elif st_type == 'state_machine':
                lines.append(f'        state_{i}: i64,')
        return lines

    def _generate_rust_impl(self) -> List[str]:
        has_stateful = self.has_stateful
        has_neighbor_filters = self.has_neighbor_filters

        lines = [
            '    impl DynamicPreprocessor {',
            '        pub fn new(buffer: usize, cache_dir: Option<&str>) -> DynamicPreprocessor {',
            '            DynamicPreprocessor {',
            '                buffer,',
            '                cache_dir: cache_dir.map(|s| s.to_string()),',
            '                current_path: None,',
            '                raw_rows: Vec::new(),',
            '                current_idx: 0,',
            '                processed_rows: 0,',
            '                cached_rows: Vec::new(),',
            '                buffer_count: 0,',
        ]

        if has_stateful:
            for i, st in enumerate(self.get_stateful_transforms()):
                st_type = st.get('type')
                if st_type == 'prefix_sum':
                    lines.append(f'                prefix_sum_{i}: 0.0,')
                elif st_type == 'prefix_count':
                    lines.append(f'                prefix_count_{i}: 0,')
                elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
                    window_size = st.get('window_size', 3)
                    lines.append(f'                window_{i}: Vec::new(),')
                    lines.append(f'                window_size_{i}: {window_size},')
                elif st_type == 'state_machine':
                    initial = st.get('initial_state', 1)
                    lines.append(f'                state_{i}: {initial},')

        if has_neighbor_filters:
            lines.extend([
                '                pending_row: None,',
                '                pending_idx: None,',
                '                prev_row: None,',
            ])

        lines.extend([
            '            }',
            '        }',
            '',
        ])

        lines.extend(self._generate_rust_open_method())
        lines.extend(self._generate_rust_helper_methods())
        lines.extend(self._generate_rust_should_keep_row())
        lines.extend(self._generate_rust_transform_row())
        lines.extend(self._generate_rust_iterator_impl())

        lines.extend([
            '    }',
            '',
        ])

        return lines

    def _generate_rust_open_method(self) -> List[str]:
        has_stateful = self.has_stateful

        lines = [
            '        pub fn open<P: AsRef<std::path::Path>>(&mut self, path: P) -> io::Result<()> {',
            '            let path_str = path.as_ref().to_string_lossy().to_string();',
            '            self.current_path = Some(path_str.clone());',
            '            self.raw_rows.clear();',
            '            self.current_idx = 0;',
            '            self.processed_rows = 0;',
            '            self.cached_rows.clear();',
            '            self.buffer_count = 0;',
            '',
        ]

        if has_stateful:
            for i, st in enumerate(self.get_stateful_transforms()):
                st_type = st.get('type')
                if st_type == 'prefix_sum':
                    lines.append(f'            self.prefix_sum_{i} = 0.0;')
                elif st_type == 'prefix_count':
                    lines.append(f'            self.prefix_count_{i} = 0;')
                elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
                    lines.append(f'            self.window_{i}.clear();')
                elif st_type == 'state_machine':
                    initial = st.get('initial_state', 1)
                    lines.append(f'            self.state_{i} = {initial};')

        lines.extend([
            '',
        ])

        if self.file_ext == 'csv':
            lines.extend([
                '            let file = File::open(&path)?;',
                '            let reader = BufReader::new(file);',
                '            let mut lines = reader.lines();',
                '',
                '            let headers: Vec<String> = if let Some(Ok(line)) = lines.next() {',
                '                line.split(\',\').map(|s| s.trim().to_string()).collect()',
                '            } else {',
                '                return Ok(());',
                '            };',
                '',
                '            for line in lines {',
                '                let line = line?;',
                '                if line.trim().is_empty() { continue; }',
                '                let values: Vec<&str> = line.split(\',\').collect();',
                '                let mut row = BTreeMap::new();',
                '                for (i, h) in headers.iter().enumerate() {',
                '                    let v = if i < values.len() { values[i].trim().to_string() } else { String::new() };',
                '                    row.insert(h.clone(), v);',
                '                }',
                '                self.raw_rows.push(row);',
                '            }',
            ])
        elif self.file_ext == 'tsv':
            lines.extend([
                '            let file = File::open(&path)?;',
                '            let reader = BufReader::new(file);',
                '            let mut lines = reader.lines();',
                '',
                '            let headers: Vec<String> = if let Some(Ok(line)) = lines.next() {',
                '                line.split(\'\\t\').map(|s| s.trim().to_string()).collect()',
                '            } else {',
                '                return Ok(());',
                '            };',
                '',
                '            for line in lines {',
                '                let line = line?;',
                '                if line.trim().is_empty() { continue; }',
                '                let values: Vec<&str> = line.split(\'\\t\').collect();',
                '                let mut row = BTreeMap::new();',
                '                for (i, h) in headers.iter().enumerate() {',
                '                    let v = if i < values.len() { values[i].trim().to_string() } else { String::new() };',
                '                    row.insert(h.clone(), v);',
                '                }',
                '                self.raw_rows.push(row);',
                '            }',
            ])
        elif self.file_ext == 'jsonl':
            lines.extend([
                '            let file = File::open(&path)?;',
                '            let reader = BufReader::new(file);',
                '',
                '            for line in reader.lines() {',
                '                let line = line?;',
                '                if line.trim().is_empty() { continue; }',
                '                if let Ok(obj) = serde_json::from_str::<serde_json::Value>(&line) {',
                '                    if let Some(map) = obj.as_object() {',
                '                        let mut row = BTreeMap::new();',
                '                        for (k, v) in map {',
                '                            let v_str = match v {',
                '                                serde_json::Value::Null => String::new(),',
                '                                serde_json::Value::Bool(b) => b.to_string(),',
                '                                serde_json::Value::Number(n) => n.to_string(),',
                '                                serde_json::Value::String(s) => s.clone(),',
                '                                _ => v.to_string(),',
                '                            };',
                '                            row.insert(k.clone(), v_str);',
                '                        }',
                '                        self.raw_rows.push(row);',
                '                    }',
                '                }',
                '            }',
            ])
        elif self.file_ext == 'json':
            lines.extend([
                '            let mut content = String::new();',
                '            File::open(&path)?.read_to_string(&mut content)?;',
                '',
                '            if let Ok(arr) = serde_json::from_str::<serde_json::Value>(&content) {',
                '                if let Some(items) = arr.as_array() {',
                '                    for item in items {',
                '                        if let Some(map) = item.as_object() {',
                '                            let mut row = BTreeMap::new();',
                '                            for (k, v) in map {',
                '                                let v_str = match v {',
                '                                    serde_json::Value::Null => String::new(),',
                '                                    serde_json::Value::Bool(b) => b.to_string(),',
                '                                    serde_json::Value::Number(n) => n.to_string(),',
                '                                    serde_json::Value::String(s) => s.clone(),',
                '                                    _ => v.to_string(),',
                '                                };',
                '                                row.insert(k.clone(), v_str);',
                '                            }',
                '                            self.raw_rows.push(row);',
                '                        }',
                '                    }',
                '                }',
                '            }',
            ])

        lines.extend([
            '',
            '            // Load cache if exists',
            '            if let Some(cache_path) = self.get_cache_path() {',
            '                self.load_cache(&cache_path);',
            '            }',
            '',
            '            Ok(())',
            '        }',
            '',
        ])

        return lines

    def _generate_rust_helper_methods(self) -> List[str]:
        has_stateful = self.has_stateful

        lines = [
            '        fn get_cache_path(&self) -> Option<PathBuf> {',
            '            let cache_dir = self.cache_dir.as_ref()?;',
            '            let path = self.current_path.as_ref()?;',
            '            let _ = fs::create_dir_all(cache_dir);',
            '            let hash = format!("{:x}", md5_hash(path.as_bytes()));',
            '            Some(PathBuf::from(cache_dir).join(format!("{}.json", hash)))',
            '        }',
            '',
            '        fn load_cache(&mut self, cache_path: &PathBuf) {',
            '            if !cache_path.exists() { return; }',
            '            if let Ok(content) = fs::read_to_string(cache_path) {',
            '                if let Ok(cache) = serde_json::from_str::<serde_json::Value>(&content) {',
            '                    if let Some(obj) = cache.as_object() {',
            '                        if let Some(v) = obj.get("processed_rows").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()) {',
            '                            self.processed_rows = v as usize;',
            '                        }',
            '                        if let Some(state) = obj.get("state").and_then(|v| v.as_object()) {',
        ]

        if has_stateful:
            for i, st in enumerate(self.get_stateful_transforms()):
                st_type = st.get('type')
                if st_type == 'prefix_sum':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'                            if let Some(v) = state.get("prefix_sum_{i}").and_then(|v| v.as_f64()) {{',
                        f'                                self.prefix_sum_{i} = v;',
                        '                            }',
                    ])
                elif st_type == 'prefix_count':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'                            if let Some(v) = state.get("prefix_count_{i}").and_then(|v| v.as_i64()) {{',
                        f'                                self.prefix_count_{i} = v;',
                        '                            }',
                    ])
                elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'                            if let Some(v) = state.get("window_{i}").and_then(|v| v.as_array()) {{',
                        f'                                self.window_{i} = v.iter().filter_map(|x| x.as_f64()).collect();',
                        '                            }',
                    ])
                elif st_type == 'state_machine':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'                            if let Some(v) = state.get("state_{i}").and_then(|v| v.as_i64()) {{',
                        f'                                self.state_{i} = v;',
                        '                            }',
                    ])

        lines.extend([
            '                        }',
            '                    }',
            '                }',
            '            }',
            '        }',
            '',
            '        fn save_cache(&mut self, cache_path: &PathBuf) {',
            '            let mut state_obj = serde_json::Map::new();',
        ])

        if has_stateful:
            for i, st in enumerate(self.get_stateful_transforms()):
                st_type = st.get('type')
                if st_type == 'prefix_sum':
                    lines.append(f'            state_obj.insert("prefix_sum_{i}".to_string(), serde_json::json!(self.prefix_sum_{i}));')
                elif st_type == 'prefix_count':
                    lines.append(f'            state_obj.insert("prefix_count_{i}".to_string(), serde_json::json!(self.prefix_count_{i}));')
                elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
                    lines.append(f'            state_obj.insert("window_{i}".to_string(), serde_json::json!(self.window_{i}));')
                elif st_type == 'state_machine':
                    lines.append(f'            state_obj.insert("state_{i}".to_string(), serde_json::json!(self.state_{i}));')

        lines.extend([
            '',
            '            let cache = serde_json::json!({',
            '                "processed_rows": self.processed_rows,',
            '                "rows": self.cached_rows,',
            '                "state": state_obj',
            '            });',
            '',
            '            let _ = fs::write(cache_path, serde_json::to_string_pretty(&cache).unwrap_or_default());',
            '        }',
            '',
            '        fn parse_value(s: &str) -> Value {',
            '            if s.is_empty() { return Value::Null; }',
            '            if s == "true" { return Value::Bool(true); }',
            '            if s == "false" { return Value::Bool(false); }',
            '            if let Ok(v) = s.parse::<i64>() { return Value::Int(v); }',
            '            if let Ok(v) = s.parse::<f64>() { return Value::Float(v); }',
            '            Value::Str(s.to_string())',
            '        }',
            '',
        ])

        return lines

    def _generate_rust_should_keep_row(self) -> List[str]:
        conditions = self.get_filter_conditions()

        lines = [
            '        fn should_keep_row(&self, row: &BTreeMap<String, String>) -> bool {',
        ]

        if not conditions:
            lines.append('            true')
        else:
            for cond in conditions:
                col = cond['column']
                op = cond['operator']
                val = cond['value']
                if op == '!=':
                    if isinstance(val, bool):
                        val_str_val = 'true' if val else 'false'
                        lines.append(f'            if row.get("{col}").map(|v| v.as_str()) == Some("{val_str_val}") {{ return false; }}')
                    else:
                        lines.append(f'            if row.get("{col}").map(|v| v.as_str()) == Some("{val}") {{ return false; }}')
                elif op == '==':
                    if isinstance(val, bool):
                        val_str_val = 'true' if val else 'false'
                        lines.append(f'            if row.get("{col}").map(|v| v.as_str()) != Some("{val_str_val}") {{ return false; }}')
                    else:
                        lines.append(f'            if row.get("{col}").map(|v| v.as_str()) != Some("{val}") {{ return false; }}')
                elif op in ('>', '>=', '<', '<='):
                    comp_ops = {'>': '<=', '>=': '<', '<': '>=', '<=': '>'}
                    lines.extend([
                        f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{col}") {{',
                        f'                if let Ok(n) = v.parse::<f64>() {{',
                        f'                    if n {comp_ops[op]} {val} {{ return false; }}',
                        '                }',
                        '            }',
                    ])
            lines.append('            true')

        lines.extend([
            '        }',
            '',
        ])

        return lines

    def _generate_rust_transform_row(self) -> List[str]:
        stateful_output_cols = self.get_stateful_output_columns()
        output_cols = self.get_output_columns()

        lines = [
            '        fn transform_row(&mut self, row: &BTreeMap<String, String>) -> Row {',
            '            let mut result = Row::new();',
            '',
        ]

        for out_col in output_cols:
            if out_col in stateful_output_cols:
                continue

            transform = self.get_column_transforms().get(out_col, {'type': 'unknown'})
            t_type = transform.get('type')
            source = transform.get('source', out_col)

            if t_type in ('identity', 'copy'):
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                    f'                result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Self::parse_value(v));',
                    '            }',
                ])
            elif t_type == 'constant':
                val = transform['value']
                if isinstance(val, bool):
                    lines.append(f'            result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Bool({"true" if val else "false"}));')
                elif isinstance(val, int):
                    lines.append(f'            result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Int({val}i64));')
                elif isinstance(val, float):
                    lines.append(f'            result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Float({val}f64));')
                elif isinstance(val, str):
                    lines.append(f'            result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Str("{val}".to_string()));')
            elif t_type in ('strip', 'lower', 'upper', 'strip_lower', 'strip_upper'):
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                    '                let mut s = v.clone();',
                ])
                if 'strip' in t_type:
                    lines.append('                s = s.trim().to_string();')
                if t_type == 'lower' or t_type == 'strip_lower':
                    lines.append('                s = s.to_lowercase();')
                elif t_type == 'upper' or t_type == 'strip_upper':
                    lines.append('                s = s.to_uppercase();')
                lines.extend([
                    f'                result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Str(s));',
                    '            }',
                ])
            elif t_type == 'add_prefix':
                prefix = transform['prefix']
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                    f'                result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Str(format!("{prefix}{{}}", v)));',
                    '            }',
                ])
            elif t_type == 'add_suffix':
                suffix = transform['suffix']
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                    f'                result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Str(format!("{{}}{suffix}", v)));',
                    '            }',
                ])
            elif t_type == 'linear':
                a, b = transform['a'], transform['b']
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                    f'                if let Ok(n) = v.parse::<f64>() {{',
                    f'                    result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Float({a}f64 * n + {b}f64));',
                    '                }',
                    '            }',
                ])
            elif t_type != 'stateful':
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{out_col}") {{',
                    f'                result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Self::parse_value(v));',
                    '            }',
                ])

        for i, st in enumerate(self.get_stateful_transforms()):
            st_type = st.get('type')
            out_col = st.get('output_column')
            source = st.get('source')
            a = st.get('a', 1.0)
            b = st.get('b', 0.0)

            if st_type == 'prefix_sum':
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                    f'                if let Ok(n) = v.parse::<f64>() {{',
                    f'                    self.prefix_sum_{i} += n;',
                    '                }',
                    '            }',
                    f'            result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Float({a}f64 * self.prefix_sum_{i} + {b}f64));',
                ])
            elif st_type == 'prefix_count':
                condition = st.get('condition')
                if condition == 'not_null':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                        f'                if !v.is_empty() {{',
                        f'                    self.prefix_count_{i} += 1;',
                        '                }',
                        '            }',
                    ])
                elif condition == 'positive':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                        f'                if let Ok(n) = v.parse::<f64>() {{',
                        f'                    if n > 0.0 {{ self.prefix_count_{i} += 1; }}',
                        '                }',
                        '            }',
                    ])
                elif condition == 'negative':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                        f'                if let Ok(n) = v.parse::<f64>() {{',
                        f'                    if n < 0.0 {{ self.prefix_count_{i} += 1; }}',
                        '                }',
                        '            }',
                    ])
                elif condition == 'true':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'            if row.get("{source}").map(|v| v.as_str()) == Some("true") {{',
                        f'                self.prefix_count_{i} += 1;',
                        '            }',
                    ])
                else:
                    lines.append(f'            self.prefix_count_{i} += 1;')
                lines.append(f'            result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Int({a} as i64 * self.prefix_count_{i} + {b} as i64));')
            elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
                operation = st.get('operation', 'mean')
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                    f'                if let Ok(n) = v.parse::<f64>() {{',
                    f'                    self.window_{i}.push(n);',
                    f'                    while self.window_{i}.len() > self.window_size_{i} {{',
                    f'                        self.window_{i}.remove(0);',
                    '                    }',
                    '                }',
                    '            }',
                ])
                if operation == 'sum':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'            let window_val_{i}: f64 = self.window_{i}.iter().sum();',
                    ])
                elif operation == 'mean':
                    lines.extend([
                        f'            let window_val_{i} = if self.window_{i}.is_empty() {{ 0.0 }} else {{',
                        f'                self.window_{i}.iter().sum::<f64>() / self.window_{i}.len() as f64',
                        '            };',
                    ])
                lines.append(f'            result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Float({a}f64 * window_val_{i} + {b}f64));')
            elif st_type == 'state_machine':
                transitions = st.get('transitions', [])
                lines.extend([
                    f'            if let Some(v) = row.get("{source}") {{',
                    f'                if let Ok(n) = v.parse::<f64>() {{',
                ])
                for t in transitions:
                    threshold = t.get('threshold')
                    direction = t.get('direction')
                    target_state = t.get('target_state')
                    if target_state is not None:
                        if direction == 'up':
                            lines.extend([
                                f'                    if n >= {threshold}f64 && self.state_{i} < {target_state} {{',
                                f'                        self.state_{i} = {target_state};',
                                '                    }',
                            ])
                        else:
                            lines.extend([
                                f'                    if n < {threshold}f64 && self.state_{i} < {target_state} {{',
                                f'                        self.state_{i} = {target_state};',
                                '                    }',
                            ])
                lines.extend([
                    '                }',
                    '            }',
                    f'            result.insert("{out_col}".to_string(), Value::Int(self.state_{i}));',
                ])

        lines.extend([
            '            result',
            '        }',
            '',
        ])

        return lines

    def _generate_rust_iterator_impl(self) -> List[str]:
        return [
            '        fn next_row(&mut self) -> Option<Row> {',
            '            let cache_path = self.get_cache_path();',
            '',
            '            while self.current_idx < self.raw_rows.len() {',
            '                if self.current_idx < self.processed_rows {',
            '                    self.current_idx += 1;',
            '                    continue;',
            '                }',
            '',
            '                let raw_row = self.raw_rows[self.current_idx].clone();',
            '                self.current_idx += 1;',
            '                self.processed_rows = self.current_idx;',
            '',
            '                if !self.should_keep_row(&raw_row) {',
            '                    if let Some(ref p) = cache_path { self.save_cache(p); }',
            '                    continue;',
            '                }',
            '',
            '                let result = self.transform_row(&raw_row);',
            '                self.cached_rows.push(result.clone());',
            '                self.buffer_count += 1;',
            '',
            '                if self.buffer_count >= self.buffer {',
            '                    if let Some(ref p) = cache_path { self.save_cache(p); }',
            '                    self.cached_rows.clear();',
            '                    self.buffer_count = 0;',
            '                }',
            '',
            '                return Some(result);',
            '            }',
            '',
            '            if self.buffer_count > 0 {',
            '                if let Some(ref p) = cache_path { self.save_cache(p); }',
            '                self.cached_rows.clear();',
            '            }',
            '',
            '            None',
            '        }',
        ]

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""C++ code generator for streaming data processor modules."""
     3→
     4→from typing import Dict, List
     5→
     6→from base_generator import CodeGenerator, val_str
     7→
     8→
     9→class CppCodeGenerator(CodeGenerator):
    10→    """Generates C++ module code from transformation config."""
    11→
    12→    def generate(self) -> Dict[str, str]:
    13→        return {
    14→            'dynamic_preprocessor.h': self._generate_header(),
    15→            'dynamic_preprocessor.cpp': self._generate_implementation(),
    16→        }
    17→
    18→    def _generate_header(self) -> str:
    19→        lines = [
    20→            '#pragma once',
    21→            '',
    22→            '#include <map>',
    23→            '#include <string>',
    24→            '#include <optional>',
    25→            '#include <cstddef>',
    26→            '',
    27→            f'namespace {self.module_name} {{',
    28→            '',

    30→            '    Null,',
    31→            '    Bool,',
    32→            '    Int,',
    33→            '    Double,',
    34→            '    String',
    35→            '};',
    36→            '',
    37→            'struct Value {',
    38→            '    ValueType type = ValueType::Null;',
    39→            '    bool bool_value = false;',
    40→            '    long long int_value = 0;',
    41→            '    double double_value = 0.0;',
    42→            '    std::string string_value;',
    43→            '',
    44→            '    Value() : type(ValueType::Null) {}',
    45→            '    explicit Value(bool v) : type(ValueType::Bool), bool_value(v) {}',
    46→            '    explicit Value(long long v) : type(ValueType::Int), int_value(v) {}',
    47→            '    explicit Value(int v) : type(ValueType::Int), int_value(v) {}',
    48→            '    explicit Value(double v) : type(ValueType::Double), double_value(v) {}',
    49→            '    explicit Value(const std::string& v) : type(ValueType::String), string_value(v) {}',
    50→            '    explicit Value(const char* v) : type(ValueType::String), string_value(v) {}',
    51→            '};',
    52→            '',
    53→            'using Row = std::map<std::string, Value>;',
    54→            '',
    55→            'class DynamicPreprocessor {',
    56→            'public:',
    57→            '    explicit DynamicPreprocessor(std::size_t buffer);',
    58→            '    DynamicPreprocessor(std::size_t buffer, const std::string& cache_dir);',
    59→            '    ~DynamicPreprocessor();',
    60→            '',
    61→            '    void open(const std::string& path);',
    62→            '    bool next(Row& out);',
    63→            '',
    64→            'private:',
    65→            '    struct Impl;',
    66→            '    Impl* impl_;',
    67→            '};',
    68→            '',
    69→            f'}} // namespace {self.module_name}',
    70→            '',
    71→        ]
    72→        return '\n'.join(lines)
    73→
    74→    def _generate_implementation(self) -> str:
    75→        has_stateful = self.has_stateful
    76→        has_neighbor_filters = self.has_neighbor_filters
    77→
    78→        lines = [
    79→            f'#include "dynamic_preprocessor.h"',
    80→            '',
    81→            '#include <fstream>',
    82→            '#include <sstream>',
    83→            '#include <vector>',
    84→            '#include <deque>',
    85→            '#include <filesystem>',
    86→            '#include <functional>',
    87→            '#include <algorithm>',
    88→            '#include <cmath>',
    89→            '#include <cstdint>',
    90→            '',
    91→            f'namespace {self.module_name} {{',
    92→            '',
    93→            '// Helper to parse string values',
    94→            'Value parseValue(const std::string& s) {',
    95→            '    if (s.empty()) return Value();',
    96→            '    if (s == "true") return Value(true);',
    97→            '    if (s == "false") return Value(false);',
    98→            '    // Try integer',
    99→            '    try {',
   100→            '        size_t pos;',
   101→            '        long long val = std::stoll(s, &pos);',
   102→            '        if (pos == s.size()) return Value(val);',
   103→            '    } catch (...) {}',
   104→            '    // Try double',
   105→            '    try {',
   106→            '        size_t pos;',
   107→            '        double val = std::stod(s, &pos);',
   108→            '        if (pos == s.size()) return Value(val);',
   109→            '    } catch (...) {}',
   110→            '    return Value(s);',
   111→            '}',
   112→            '',
   113→            '// MD5 implementation for cache key',
   114→            'std::string md5(const std::string& input) {',
   115→            '    uint8_t digest[16];',
   116→            '    // Simple hash for cross-platform compatibility',
   117→            '    uint32_t hash = 5381;',
   118→            '    for (char c : input) hash = ((hash << 5) + hash) + c;',
   119→            '    for (char c : input) hash = ((hash << 5) + hash) + c;',
   120→            '    char buf[33];',
   121→            '    snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), "%08x%08x%08x%08x", hash, hash ^ 0xDEADBEEF, hash ^ 0xCAFEBABE, hash ^ 0x12345678);',
   122→            '    return std::string(buf, 32);',
   123→            '}',
   124→            '',
   125→            '// JSON-like serialization for Value',
   126→            'std::string valueToJson(const Value& v) {',
   127→            '    switch (v.type) {',
   128→            '        case ValueType::Null: return "null";',
   129→            '        case ValueType::Bool: return v.bool_value ? "true" : "false";',
   130→            '        case ValueType::Int: return std::to_string(v.int_value);',
   131→            '        case ValueType::Double: {',
   132→            '            std::ostringstream oss;',
   133→            '            oss << v.double_value;',
   134→            '            return oss.str();',
   135→            '        }',
   136→            '        case ValueType::String: {',
   137→            '            std::string result = "\\"";',
   138→            '            for (char c : v.string_value) {',
   139→            '                if (c == \'\\\\\' || c == \'\\"\') result += \'\\\\\';',
   140→            '                result += c;',
   141→            '            }',
   142→            '            result += \'"\';',
   143→            '            return result;',
   144→            '        }',
   145→            '    }',
   146→            '    return "null";',
   147→            '}',
   148→            '',
   149→            'Value jsonToValue(const std::string& s) {',
   150→            '    if (s == "null") return Value();',
   151→            '    if (s == "true") return Value(true);',
   152→            '    if (s == "false") return Value(false);',
   153→            '    if (s.size() >= 2 && s.front() == \'\\"\' && s.back() == \'\\"\') {',
   154→            '        std::string inner = s.substr(1, s.size() - 2);',
   155→            '        std::string result;',
   156→            '        for (size_t i = 0; i < inner.size(); ++i) {',
   157→            '            if (inner[i] == \'\\\\\' && i + 1 < inner.size()) {',
   158→            '                result += inner[++i];',
   159→            '            } else {',
   160→            '                result += inner[i];',
   161→            '            }',
   162→            '        }',
   163→            '        return Value(result);',
   164→            '    }',
   165→            '    try { return Value(std::stoll(s)); } catch (...) {}',
   166→            '    try { return Value(std::stod(s)); } catch (...) {}',
   167→            '    return Value(s);',
   168→            '}',
   169→            '',
   170→            'struct DynamicPreprocessor::Impl {',
   171→            '    std::size_t buffer;',
   172→            '    std::string cacheDir;',
   173→            '    std::string currentPath;',
   174→            '    std::vector<std::map<std::string, std::string>> rawRows;',
   175→            '    size_t currentIdx = 0;',
   176→            '    size_t processedRows = 0;',
   177→            '    std::vector<Row> cachedRows;',
   178→            '',
   179→        ]
   180→
   181→        if has_stateful:
   182→            lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_state_vars())
   183→
   184→        lines.extend([
   185→            '    Impl(std::size_t buf, const std::string& cd) : buffer(buf), cacheDir(cd) {}',
   186→            '',
   187→            '    std::string getCachePath(const std::string& path) {',
   188→            '        if (cacheDir.empty()) return "";',
   189→            '        std::filesystem::create_directories(cacheDir);',
   190→            '        std::string absPath = std::filesystem::absolute(path).string();',
   191→            '        return cacheDir + "/" + md5(absPath) + ".json";',
   192→            '    }',
   193→            '',
   194→            '    void loadCache(const std::string& cachePath) {',
   195→            '        processedRows = 0;',
   196→            '        cachedRows.clear();',
   197→            '        if (cachePath.empty()) return;',
   198→            '        std::ifstream f(cachePath);',
   199→            '        if (!f.is_open()) return;',
   200→            '        std::stringstream ss;',
   201→            '        ss << f.rdbuf();',
   202→            '        std::string content = ss.str();',
   203→            '        // Parse JSON-like cache',
   204→            '        size_t pos = content.find("\\"processed_rows\\"");',
   205→            '        if (pos != std::string::npos) {',
   206→            '            pos = content.find(":", pos);',
   207→            '            if (pos != std::string::npos) {',
   208→            '                processedRows = std::stoull(content.substr(pos + 1));',
   209→            '            }',
   210→            '        }',
   211→        ])
   212→
   213→        if has_stateful:
   214→            lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_state_load())
   215→
   216→        lines.extend([
   217→            '    }',
   218→            '',
   219→            '    void saveCache(const std::string& cachePath) {',
   220→            '        if (cachePath.empty()) return;',
   221→            '        std::ofstream f(cachePath);',
   222→            '        if (!f.is_open()) return;',
   223→            '        f << "{\\"processed_rows\\": " << processedRows;',
   224→            '        f << ", \\"rows\\": [";',
   225→            '        for (size_t i = 0; i < cachedRows.size(); ++i) {',
   226→            '            if (i > 0) f << ", ";',
   227→            '            f << "{";',
   228→            '            bool first = true;',
   229→            '            for (const auto& [k, v] : cachedRows[i]) {',
   230→            '                if (!first) f << ", ";',
   231→            '                first = false;',
   232→            '                f << "\\"" << k << "\\": " << valueToJson(v);',
   233→            '            }',
   234→            '            f << "}";',
   235→            '        }',
   236→            '        f << "], \\"state\\": {";',
   237→        ])
   238→
   239→        if has_stateful:
   240→            lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_state_save())
   241→
   242→        lines.extend([
   243→            '        f << "}}";',
   244→            '    }',
   245→            '',
   246→        ])
   247→
   248→        lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_should_keep_row())
   249→        lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_transform_row())
   250→
   251→        lines.extend([
   252→            '    void parseFile(const std::string& path) {',
   253→            '        rawRows.clear();',
   254→        ])
   255→
   256→        if self.file_ext == 'csv':
   257→            lines.extend(self._generate_csv_parser())
   258→        elif self.file_ext == 'tsv':
   259→            lines.extend(self._generate_tsv_parser())
   260→        elif self.file_ext == 'jsonl':
   261→            lines.extend(self._generate_jsonl_parser())
   262→        elif self.file_ext == 'json':
   263→            lines.extend(self._generate_json_parser())
   264→
   265→        lines.extend([
   266→            '    }',
   267→            '};',
   268→            '',
   269→        ])
   270→
   271→        if has_neighbor_filters:
   272→            lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_neighbor_filter_methods())
   273→
   274→        lines.extend([
   275→            'DynamicPreprocessor::DynamicPreprocessor(std::size_t buffer)',
   276→            '    : impl_(new Impl(buffer, "")) {}',
   277→            '',
   278→            'DynamicPreprocessor::DynamicPreprocessor(std::size_t buffer, const std::string& cache_dir)',
   279→            '    : impl_(new Impl(buffer, cache_dir)) {}',
   280→            '',
   281→            'DynamicPreprocessor::~DynamicPreprocessor() { delete impl_; }',
   282→            '',
   283→            'void DynamicPreprocessor::open(const std::string& path) {',
   284→            '    impl_->currentPath = path;',
   285→            '    impl_->parseFile(path);',
   286→            '    impl_->currentIdx = 0;',
   287→            '    std::string cachePath = impl_->getCachePath(path);',
   288→            '    impl_->loadCache(cachePath);',
   289→        ])
   290→
   291→        if has_stateful:
   292→            lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_state_restore())
   293→
   294→        lines.extend([
   295→            '}',
   296→            '',
   297→            'bool DynamicPreprocessor::next(Row& out) {',
   298→        ])
   299→
   300→        if has_neighbor_filters:
   301→            lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_next_with_neighbor_filters())
   302→        else:
   303→            lines.extend(self._generate_cpp_next_standard())
   304→
   305→        lines.extend([
   306→            f'}} // namespace {self.module_name}',
   307→            '',
   308→        ])
   309→
   310→        return '\n'.join(lines)
   311→
   312→    def _generate_csv_parser(self) -> List[str]:
   313→        return [
   314→            '        std::ifstream f(path);',
   315→            '        if (!f.is_open()) return;',
   316→            '        std::string line;',
   317→            '        std::getline(f, line);',
   318→            '        std::vector<std::string> headers;',
   319→            '        std::stringstream hs(line);',
   320→            '        std::string h;',
   321→            '        while (std::getline(hs, h, \',\')) headers.push_back(h);',
   322→            '        while (std::getline(f, line)) {',
   323→            '            if (line.empty()) continue;',
   324→            '            std::map<std::string, std::string> row;',
   325→            '            std::stringstream ls(line);',
   326→            '            std::string val;',
   327→            '            for (size_t i = 0; i < headers.size() && std::getline(ls, val, \',\'); ++i) {',
   328→            '                row[headers[i]] = val;',
   329→            '            }',
   330→            '            rawRows.push_back(row);',
   331→            '        }',
   332→        ]
   333→
   334→    def _generate_tsv_parser(self) -> List[str]:
   335→        return [
   336→            '        std::ifstream f(path);',
   337→            '        if (!f.is_open()) return;',
   338→            '        std::string line;',
   339→            '        std::getline(f, line);',
   340→            '        std::vector<std::string> headers;',
   341→            '        std::stringstream hs(line);',
   342→            '        std::string h;',
   343→            '        while (std::getline(hs, h, \'\\t\')) headers.push_back(h);',
   344→            '        while (std::getline(f, line)) {',
   345→            '            if (line.empty()) continue;',
   346→            '            std::map<std::string, std::string> row;',
   347→            '            std::stringstream ls(line);',
   348→            '            std::string val;',
   349→            '            for (size_t i = 0; i < headers.size() && std::getline(ls, val, \'\\t\'); ++i) {',
   350→            '                row[headers[i]] = val;',
   351→            '            }',
   352→            '            rawRows.push_back(row);',
   353→            '        }',
   354→        ]
   355→
   356→    def _generate_jsonl_parser(self) -> List[str]:
   357→        return [
   358→            '        std::ifstream f(path);',
   359→            '        if (!f.is_open()) return;',
   360→            '        std::string line;',
   361→            '        while (std::getline(f, line)) {',
   362→            '            if (line.empty()) continue;',
   363→            '            // Simple JSONL parsing',
   364→            '            std::map<std::string, std::string> row;',
   365→            '            size_t pos = 0;',
   366→            '            while ((pos = line.find("\\"", pos)) != std::string::npos) {',
   367→            '                size_t keyStart = pos + 1;',
   368→            '                size_t keyEnd = line.find("\\"", keyStart);',
   369→            '                if (keyEnd == std::string::npos) break;',
   370→            '                std::string key = line.substr(keyStart, keyEnd - keyStart);',
   371→            '                size_t colon = line.find(":", keyEnd);',
   372→            '                if (colon == std::string::npos) break;',
   373→            '                size_t valStart = line.find_first_not_of(" \\t", colon + 1);',
   374→            '                if (valStart == std::string::npos) break;',
   375→            '                size_t valEnd;',
   376→            '                if (line[valStart] == \'\\"\') {',
   377→            '                    valEnd = line.find("\\"", valStart + 1);',
   378→            '                    if (valEnd != std::string::npos) valEnd++;',
   379→            '                } else if (line[valStart] == \'{\' || line[valStart] == \'[\') {',
   380→            '                    int depth = 1;',
   381→            '                    valEnd = valStart + 1;',
   382→            '                    while (valEnd < line.size() && depth > 0) {',
   383→            '                        if (line[valEnd] == \'{\' || line[valEnd] == \'[\') depth++;',
   384→            '                        else if (line[valEnd] == \'}\' || line[valEnd] == \']\') depth--;',
   385→            '                        valEnd++;',
   386→            '                    }',
   387→            '                } else {',
   388→            '                    valEnd = line.find_first_of(",}]", valStart);',
   389→            '                    if (valEnd == std::string::npos) valEnd = line.size();',
   390→            '                }',
   391→            '                std::string val = line.substr(valStart, valEnd - valStart);',
   392→            '                // Remove quotes from string values',
   393→            '                if (val.size() >= 2 && val.front() == \'\\"\' && val.back() == \'\\"\') {',
   394→            '                    val = val.substr(1, val.size() - 2);',
   395→            '                }',
   396→            '                row[key] = val;',
   397→            '                pos = valEnd;',
   398→            '            }',
   399→            '            rawRows.push_back(row);',
   400→            '        }',
   401→        ]
   402→
   403→    def _generate_json_parser(self) -> List[str]:
   404→        return [
   405→            '        std::ifstream f(path);',
   406→            '        if (!f.is_open()) return;',
   407→            '        std::stringstream ss;',
   408→            '        ss << f.rdbuf();',
   409→            '        std::string content = ss.str();',
   410→            '        // Simple JSON array parsing',
   411→            '        size_t pos = content.find("[");',
   412→            '        if (pos == std::string::npos) return;',
   413→            '        pos++;',
   414→            '        while (pos < content.size()) {',
   415→            '            pos = content.find("{", pos);',
   416→            '            if (pos == std::string::npos) break;',
   417→            '            size_t objEnd = pos;',
   418→            '            int depth = 1;',
   419→            '            objEnd++;',
   420→            '            while (objEnd < content.size() && depth > 0) {',
   421→            '                if (content[objEnd] == \'{\' || content[objEnd] == \'[\') depth++;',
   422→            '                else if (content[objEnd] == \'}\' || content[objEnd] == \']\') depth--;',
   423→            '                objEnd++;',
   424→            '            }',
   425→            '            std::string obj = content.substr(pos, objEnd - pos);',
   426→            '            std::map<std::string, std::string> row;',
   427→            '            size_t keyPos = 0;',
   428→            '            while ((keyPos = obj.find("\\"", keyPos)) != std::string::npos) {',
   429→            '                size_t keyStart = keyPos + 1;',
   430→            '                size_t keyEnd = obj.find("\\"", keyStart);',
   431→            '                if (keyEnd == std::string::npos) break;',
   432→            '                std::string key = obj.substr(keyStart, keyEnd - keyStart);',
   433→            '                size_t colon = obj.find(":", keyEnd);',
   434→            '                if (colon == std::string::npos) break;',
   435→            '                size_t valStart = obj.find_first_not_of(" \\t", colon + 1);',
   436→            '                if (valStart == std::string::npos) break;',
   437→            '                size_t valEnd;',
   438→            '                if (obj[valStart] == \'\\"\') {',
   439→            '                    valEnd = obj.find("\\"", valStart + 1);',
   440→            '                    if (valEnd != std::string::npos) valEnd++;',
   441→            '                } else if (obj[valStart] == \'{\' || obj[valStart] == \'[\') {',
   442→            '                    int d = 1;',
   443→            '                    valEnd = valStart + 1;',
   444→            '                    while (valEnd < obj.size() && d > 0) {',
   445→            '                        if (obj[valEnd] == \'{\' || obj[valEnd] == \'[\') d++;',
   446→            '                        else if (obj[valEnd] == \'}\' || obj[valEnd] == \']\') d--;',
   447→            '                        valEnd++;',
   448→            '                    }',
   449→            '                } else {',
   450→            '                    valEnd = obj.find_first_of(",}]", valStart);',
   451→            '                    if (valEnd == std::string::npos) valEnd = obj.size();',
   452→            '                }',
   453→            '                std::string val = obj.substr(valStart, valEnd - valStart);',
   454→            '                if (val.size() >= 2 && val.front() == \'\\"\' && val.back() == \'\\"\') {',
   455→            '                    val = val.substr(1, val.size() - 2);',
   456→            '                }',
   457→            '                row[key] = val;',
   458→            '                keyPos = valEnd;',
   459→            '            }',
   460→            '            rawRows.push_back(row);',
   461→            '            pos = objEnd;',
   462→            '        }',
   463→        ]

   465→    def _generate_cpp_state_vars(self) -> List[str]:
   466→        lines = []

   468→            st_type = st.get('type')

   471→            elif st_type == 'prefix_count':

   473→            elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
   474→                window_size = st.get('window_size', 3)
   475→                lines.append(f'    std::deque<double> window_{i};')
   476→                lines.append(f'    size_t windowSize_{i} = {window_size};')
   477→            elif st_type == 'state_machine':
   478→                initial = st.get('initial_state', 1)
   479→                lines.append(f'    long long state_{i} = {initial};')

   482→    def _generate_cpp_state_load(self) -> List[str]:
   483→        lines = []
   484→        lines.append('        // Load state')
   485→        for i, st in enumerate(self.get_stateful_transforms()):
   486→            st_type = st.get('type')
   487→            if st_type == 'prefix_sum':
   488→                lines.extend([
   489→                    f'        {{',
   490→                    f'            std::string key = "\\"prefix_sum_{i}\\"";',
   491→                    f'            size_t pos = content.find(key);',
   492→                    f'            if (pos != std::string::npos) {{',
   493→                    f'                pos = content.find(":", pos);',
   494→                    f'                if (pos != std::string::npos) prefixSum_{i} = std::stod(content.substr(pos + 1));',
   495→                    f'            }}',
   496→                    f'        }}',
   497→                ])
   498→            elif st_type == 'prefix_count':
   499→                lines.extend([
   500→                    f'        {{',
   501→                    f'            std::string key = "\\"prefix_count_{i}\\"";',
   502→                    f'            size_t pos = content.find(key);',
   503→                    f'            if (pos != std::string::npos) {{',
   504→                    f'                pos = content.find(":", pos);',
   505→                    f'                if (pos != std::string::npos) prefixCount_{i} = std::stoll(content.substr(pos + 1));',
   506→                    f'            }}',
   507→                    f'        }}',
   508→                ])
   509→            elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
   510→                lines.extend([
   511→                    f'        {{',
   512→                    f'            std::string key = "\\"window_{i}\\"";',
   513→                    f'            size_t pos = content.find(key);',
   514→                    f'            if (pos != std::string::npos) {{',
   515→                    f'                pos = content.find("[", pos);',
   516→                    f'                if (pos != std::string::npos) {{',
   517→                    f'                    size_t end = content.find("]", pos);',
   518→                    f'                    std::string arr = content.substr(pos + 1, end - pos - 1);',
   519→                    f'                    std::stringstream ss(arr);',
   520→                    f'                    std::string val;',
   521→                    f'                    window_{i}.clear();',
   522→                    f'                    while (std::getline(ss, val, \',\')) {{',
   523→                    f'                        size_t start = val.find_first_not_of(" \\t\\n\\r");',
   524→                    f'                        size_t end = val.find_last_not_of(" \\t\\n\\r");',
   525→                    f'                        if (start != std::string::npos && end != std::string::npos) {{',
   526→                    f'                            window_{i}.push_back(std::stod(val.substr(start, end - start + 1)));',
   527→                    f'                        }}',
   528→                    f'                    }}',
   529→                    f'                }}',
   530→                    f'            }}',
   531→                    f'        }}',
   532→                ])
   533→            elif st_type == 'state_machine':
   534→                lines.extend([
   535→                    f'        {{',
   536→                    f'            std::string key = "\\"state_{i}\\"";',
   537→                    f'            size_t pos = content.find(key);',
   538→                    f'            if (pos != std::string::npos) {{',
   539→                    f'                pos = content.find(":", pos);',
   540→                    f'                if (pos != std::string::npos) state_{i} = std::stoll(content.substr(pos + 1));',
   541→                    f'            }}',
   542→                    f'        }}',
   543→                ])
   544→        return lines

   546→    def _generate_cpp_state_save(self) -> List[str]:

   564→                ])

   566→                lines.append(f'        f << "\\"state_{i}\\": " << state_{i};')

   584→    def _generate_cpp_should_keep_row(self) -> List[str]:
   585→        conditions = self.get_filter_conditions()
   586→        lines = [
   587→            '    bool shouldKeepRow(const std::map<std::string, std::string>& row) {',
   588→        ]
   589→        if not conditions:
   590→            lines.append('        return true;')
   591→        else:
   592→            for cond in conditions:
   593→                col = cond['column']
   594→                op = cond['operator']
   595→                val = cond['value']
   596→                if op == '!=':
   597→                    if isinstance(val, bool):
   598→                        lines.append(f'        if (row.count("{col}") && row.at("{col}") == "{"true" if val else "false"}") return false;')
   599→                    elif isinstance(val, str):
   600→                        lines.append(f'        if (row.count("{col}") && row.at("{col}") == "{val}") return false;')
   601→                    else:
   602→                        lines.append(f'        if (row.count("{col}") && row.at("{col}") == "{val}") return false;')
   603→                elif op == '==':
   604→                    if isinstance(val, bool):
   605→                        lines.append(f'        if (!row.count("{col}") || row.at("{col}") != "{"true" if val else "false"}") return false;')
   606→                    elif isinstance(val, str):
   607→                        lines.append(f'        if (!row.count("{col}") || row.at("{col}") != "{val}") return false;')
   608→                    else:
   609→                        lines.append(f'        if (!row.count("{col}") || row.at("{col}") != "{val}") return false;')
   610→                elif op in ('>', '>=', '<', '<='):
   611→                    comp_ops = {'>': '<=', '>=': '<', '<': '>=', '<=': '>'}
   612→                    lines.append(f'        if (row.count("{col}") && !row.at("{col}").empty()) {{')
   613→                    lines.append(f'            try {{')
   614→                    lines.append(f'                double v = std::stod(row.at("{col}"));')
   615→                    lines.append(f'                if (v {comp_ops[op]} {val}) return false;')
   616→                    lines.append(f'            }} catch (...) {{}}')
   617→                    lines.append(f'        }}')
   618→            lines.append('        return true;')
   619→        lines.append('    }')
   620→        return lines
   621→
   622→    def _generate_cpp_transform_row(self) -> List[str]:
   623→        stateful_output_cols = self.get_stateful_output_columns()
   624→        output_cols = self.get_output_columns()
   625→
   626→        lines = [
   627→            '    Row transformRow(const std::map<std::string, std::string>& rawRow) {',
   628→            '        Row result;',
   629→        ]
   630→
   631→        for out_col in output_cols:
   632→            if out_col in stateful_output_cols:
   633→                continue
   634→
   635→            transform = self.get_column_transforms().get(out_col, {'type': 'unknown'})
   636→            t_type = transform.get('type')
   637→            source = transform.get('source', out_col)
   638→
   639→            if t_type in ('identity', 'copy'):
   640→                lines.append(f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}")) result["{out_col}"] = parseValue(rawRow.at("{source}"));')
   641→            elif t_type == 'constant':
   642→                val = transform['value']
   643→                if isinstance(val, bool):
   644→                    lines.append(f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value({"true" if val else "false"});')
   645→                elif isinstance(val, int):
   646→                    lines.append(f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value({val}LL);')
   647→                elif isinstance(val, float):
   648→                    lines.append(f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value({val});')
   649→                elif isinstance(val, str):
   650→                    lines.append(f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value("{val}");')
   651→                else:
   652→                    lines.append(f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value();')
   653→            elif t_type in ('strip', 'lower', 'upper', 'strip_lower', 'strip_upper'):
   654→                lines.append(f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}")) {{')
   655→                lines.append(f'            std::string s = rawRow.at("{source}");')
   656→                if 'strip' in t_type:
   657→                    lines.append('            size_t start = s.find_first_not_of(" \\t\\n\\r");')
   658→                    lines.append('            size_t end = s.find_last_not_of(" \\t\\n\\r");')
   659→                    lines.append('            if (start != std::string::npos) s = s.substr(start, end - start + 1);')
   660→                    lines.append('            else s.clear();')
   661→                if t_type == 'lower' or t_type == 'strip_lower':
   662→                    lines.append('            std::transform(s.begin(), s.end(), s.begin(), ::tolower);')
   663→                elif t_type == 'upper' or t_type == 'strip_upper':
   664→                    lines.append('            std::transform(s.begin(), s.end(), s.begin(), ::toupper);')
   665→                lines.append(f'            result["{out_col}"] = Value(s);')
   666→                lines.append('        }')
   667→            elif t_type == 'add_prefix':
   668→                prefix = transform['prefix']
   669→                lines.append(f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}")) {{')
   670→                lines.append(f'            std::string s = rawRow.at("{source}");')
   671→                lines.append(f'            result["{out_col}"] = Value("{prefix}" + s);')
   672→                lines.append('        }')
   673→            elif t_type == 'add_suffix':
   674→                suffix = transform['suffix']
   675→                lines.append(f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}")) {{')
   676→                lines.append(f'            std::string s = rawRow.at("{source}");')
   677→                lines.append(f'            result["{out_col}"] = Value(s + "{suffix}");')
   678→                lines.append('        }')
   679→            elif t_type == 'linear':
   680→                a, b = transform['a'], transform['b']
   681→                lines.append(f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}") && !rawRow.at("{source}").empty()) {{')
   682→                lines.append(f'            try {{')
   683→                lines.append(f'                double v = std::stod(rawRow.at("{source}"));')
   684→                lines.append(f'                result["{out_col}"] = Value({a} * v + {b});')
   685→                lines.append(f'            }} catch (...) {{}}')
   686→                lines.append('        }')
   687→            elif t_type != 'stateful':
   688→                lines.append(f'        if (rawRow.count("{out_col}")) result["{out_col}"] = parseValue(rawRow.at("{out_col}"));')
   689→
   690→        for i, st in enumerate(self.get_stateful_transforms()):
   691→            st_type = st.get('type')
   692→            out_col = st.get('output_column')
   693→            source = st.get('source')
   694→            a = st.get('a', 1.0)
   695→            b = st.get('b', 0.0)
   696→
   697→            if st_type == 'prefix_sum':
   698→                lines.extend([
   699→                    f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}") && !rawRow.at("{source}").empty()) {{',
   700→                    f'            try {{ prefixSum_{i} += std::stod(rawRow.at("{source}")); }} catch (...) {{}}',
   701→                    '        }',
   702→                    f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value({a} * prefixSum_{i} + {b});',
   703→                ])
   704→            elif st_type == 'prefix_count':
   705→                condition = st.get('condition')
   706→                if condition == 'not_null':
   707→                    lines.extend([
   708→                        f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}") && !rawRow.at("{source}").empty()) {{',
   709→                        f'            prefixCount_{i}++;',
   710→                        '        }',
   711→                    ])
   712→                elif condition == 'positive':
   713→                    lines.extend([
   714→                        f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}") && !rawRow.at("{source}").empty()) {{',
   715→                        f'            try {{ if (std::stod(rawRow.at("{source}")) > 0) prefixCount_{i}++; }} catch (...) {{}}',
   716→                        '        }',
   717→                    ])
   718→                elif condition == 'negative':
   719→                    lines.extend([
   720→                        f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}") && !rawRow.at("{source}").empty()) {{',
   721→                        f'            try {{ if (std::stod(rawRow.at("{source}")) < 0) prefixCount_{i}++; }} catch (...) {{}}',
   722→                        '        }',
   723→                    ])
   724→                elif condition == 'true':
   725→                    lines.extend([
   726→                        f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}") && rawRow.at("{source}") == "true") {{',
   727→                        f'            prefixCount_{i}++;',
   728→                        '        }',
   729→                    ])
   730→                else:
   731→                    lines.append(f'        prefixCount_{i}++;')
   732→                lines.append(f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value({a} * prefixCount_{i} + {b});')
   733→            elif st_type == 'sliding_window':
   734→                operation = st.get('operation', 'mean')
   735→                lines.extend([
   736→                    f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}") && !rawRow.at("{source}").empty()) {{',
   737→                    f'            try {{',
   738→                    f'                window_{i}.push_back(std::stod(rawRow.at("{source}")));',
   739→                    f'                while (window_{i}.size() > windowSize_{i}) window_{i}.pop_front();',
   740→                    f'            }} catch (...) {{}}',
   741→                    '        }',
   742→                ])
   743→                if operation == 'sum':
   744→                    lines.extend([
   745→                        f'        double windowVal_{i} = 0.0;',
   746→                        f'        for (double v : window_{i}) windowVal_{i} += v;',
   747→                    ])
   748→                elif operation == 'mean':
   749→                    lines.extend([
   750→                        f'        double windowVal_{i} = 0.0;',
   751→                        f'        for (double v : window_{i}) windowVal_{i} += v;',
   752→                        f'        if (!window_{i}.empty()) windowVal_{i} /= window_{i}.size();',
   753→                    ])
   754→                lines.append(f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value({a} * windowVal_{i} + {b});')
   755→            elif st_type == 'state_machine':
   756→                transitions = st.get('transitions', [])
   757→                lines.extend([
   758→                    f'        if (rawRow.count("{source}") && !rawRow.at("{source}").empty()) {{',
   759→                    f'            try {{',
   760→                    f'                double val_sm = std::stod(rawRow.at("{source}"));',
   761→                ])
   762→                for t in transitions:
   763→                    threshold = t.get('threshold')
   764→                    direction = t.get('direction')
   765→                    target_state = t.get('target_state')
   766→                    if target_state is not None:
   767→                        if direction == 'up':
   768→                            lines.extend([
   769→                                f'                if (val_sm >= {threshold} && state_{i} < {target_state}) state_{i} = {target_state};',
   770→                            ])
   771→                        else:
   772→                            lines.extend([
   773→                                f'                if (val_sm < {threshold} && state_{i} < {target_state}) state_{i} = {target_state};',
   774→                            ])
   775→                lines.extend([
   776→                    '            } catch (...) {}',
   777→                    '        }',
   778→                    f'        result["{out_col}"] = Value(state_{i});',
   779→                ])
   780→
   781→        lines.append('        return result;')
   782→        lines.append('    }')
   783→        return lines
   784→
   785→    def _generate_cpp_neighbor_filter_methods(self) -> List[str]:
   786→        lines = []
   787→        for i, nf in enumerate(self.get_neighbor_filters()):
   788→            nf_type = nf.get('type')
   789→            if nf_type == 'next_row_condition':
   790→                col = nf.get('column')
   791→                val = nf.get('value')
   792→                if isinstance(val, bool):
   793→                    val_str_val = 'true' if val else 'false'
   794→                elif isinstance(val, str):
   795→                    val_str_val = val
   796→                else:
   797→                    val_str_val = str(val)
   798→                lines.extend([
   799→                    f'    bool checkNeighborFilter_{i}(const std::map<std::string, std::string>& current,',
   800→                    f'                                const std::map<std::string, std::string>* next) {{',
   801→                    f'        if (!next) return true;',
   802→                    f'        if (next->count("{col}") && next->at("{col}") == "{val_str_val}") return false;',
   803→                    '        return true;',
   804→                    '    }',
   805→                ])
   806→            elif nf_type == 'consecutive_duplicate':
   807→                col = nf.get('column')
   808→                lines.extend([
   809→                    f'    bool checkNeighborFilter_{i}(const std::map<std::string, std::string>& current,',
   810→                    f'                                const std::map<std::string, std::string>* prev) {{',
   811→                    f'        if (!prev) return true;',
   812→                    f'        if (prev->count("{col}") && current.count("{col}") &&',
   813→                    f'            prev->at("{col}") == current.at("{col}")) return false;',
   814→                    '        return true;',
   815→                    '    }',
   816→                ])
   817→        return lines
   818→
   819→    def _generate_cpp_next_standard(self) -> List[str]:
   820→        return [
   821→            '    std::string cachePath = impl_->getCachePath(impl_->currentPath);',
   822→            '    size_t bufferCount = 0;',
   823→            '',
   824→            '    while (impl_->currentIdx < impl_->rawRows.size()) {',
   825→            '        if (impl_->currentIdx < impl_->processedRows) {',
   826→            '            impl_->currentIdx++;',

   829→            '',
   830→            '        const auto& rawRow = impl_->rawRows[impl_->currentIdx];',
   831→            '        impl_->currentIdx++;',

   833→            '',
   834→            '        if (!impl_->shouldKeepRow(rawRow)) {',
   835→            '            impl_->saveCache(cachePath);',
   836→            '            continue;',

   838→            '',

   840→            '        impl_->cachedRows.push_back(out);',
   841→            '        bufferCount++;',

   843→            '        if (bufferCount >= impl_->buffer) {',

   855→            '    }',

   858→            '}',
   859→        ]

   861→    def _generate_cpp_next_with_neighbor_filters(self) -> List[str]:
